headline: Microsoft, Salesforce, ServiceNow Sell-Off Is Overdone: Dan Ives
summary: Dan Ives is calling the turn. With geopolitical tensions easing after Iran ceasefire developments, the Wedbush analyst sees a risk-on shift underway—and argues that tech stocks, especially Microsoft Corporation, Salesforce, Inc. and ServiceNow, Inc, are mispriced right as AI demand accelerates. AI Demand Is Hitting Now, Not Later After weeks of industry checks, Ives says the message from CIOs is clear: AI adoption is moving fast from experimentation to deployment.
